escalation.rationale: Ukrainian drone strikes on St. Petersburg during Putin's economic forum and Iran threatening to close Bab el-Mandeb Strait indicate expanded conflict fronts.

ticker_items: Ukrainian drones strike St. Petersburg during Putin's economic forum
Iran threatens closure of Bab el-Mandeb Strait amid ceasefire collapse
IDF targets first responders in southern Lebanon
Oil prices surge on strait closure threats

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drones attacked energy and military sites in St. Petersburg ahead of Russia's economic forum.
Ukrainian drones struck naval base and oil terminal during SPIEF economic forum.
Russian missile and drone barrage across multiple Ukrainian cities.

middle_east.description: Iranian drone attack hit Kuwait's international airport, killing one person and injuring several.
Iran fired missiles at Bahrain as part of renewed Persian Gulf hostilities.
US strikes island in Strait of Hormuz as part of trading strikes with Iran.
IDF targeted rescue workers and first responders in southern Lebanon.

claimed_totals.figure: 3,468 dead in Iran, 3,371 dead in Lebanon, 28 killed in Gulf states

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran death toll

middle_east.text: Tehran had said it would suspend negotiations over Israeli strikes in Lebanon
middle_east.speaker: Unknown
middle_east.title: Iranian official

observers.description: Former Polish Ambassador to Kiev Bartosz Cichocki returned a Ukrainian state merit over Kiev's glorification of nationalist fighters accused of wartime atrocities. This diplomatic gesture reflects growing tensions over historical narratives between the allies.

Armenia prepares for June 7 parliamentary elections that will test public opinion on the country's geopolitical direction. The vote represents a choice between maintaining traditional ties with Russia or pursuing closer relations with the European Union.

Pakistan is emerging as an unlikely mediator between the US and Iran, illustrating how diplomacy has become more personal and transactional under President Trump. The country is using the Iran war to reinvent its regional role.

France restricted Israeli weapons displays at Paris Defense Expo, banning offensive systems. France is hoping to reassert its diminishing influence in the Middle East region, particularly regarding Lebanon's future.

China has become the dominant power in Central Asia following the US withdrawal from Afghanistan. Chinese-aligned groups are conducting espionage operations in Venezuela, the Gulf, and targeting AI robotics in South Korea.

financial.notes: Oil prices surge on Iranian threats to close Bab el-Mandeb Strait, with analysts warning prices could double.

update_log.text: Ukrainian drones struck St. Petersburg naval base and oil terminal during Putin's economic forum.
Iran threatens to close Bab el-Mandeb Strait as ceasefire talks collapse.
Russia and Taliban signed agreement on repairing Soviet-era weapons.
IDF targeting first responders in southern Lebanon around Nabatieh.
Ukrainian drones struck St. Petersburg energy and military sites during Russia's economic forum
Iranian drone attack on Kuwait airport kills one, suspends commercial flights
Iran and US trade missile strikes in Persian Gulf as ceasefire talks stall
Russia killed 23 people across Ukraine in devastating air attacks yesterday
